sqlMap.sql: select survey_id, company_id, tenant_id, title, purpose, user_id, date_add(create_date, interval #offset# minute) as create_date, date_add(update_date, interval #offset# minute) as update_date, date_add(start_date, interval #offset# minute) as start_date, date_add(end_date, interval #offset# minute) as end_date, case when #primary# = '1' then user_name1 else user_name2 end as user_name, user_name1, user_name2, delete_user, update_user, use_status, open_days, result_public_flag, anonymous_flag, multi_answer_flag, participate_flag, attach_flag, modify_flag, draft_flag, response_flag, total_user, mail_flag, popup_flag from tbl_survey

where use_status = 1 and tenant_id = #tenantId# and modify_flag = 0 title like concat('%', concat(#title#, '%'))
(create_date <= #endDate#)
draft_flag = 0
(survey_id = -1 or user_id = #userId#)
(survey_id in #surveyIds[]#)
(start_date <= #today# and end_date >= #today#) (survey_id = -1)
(survey_id in #surveyIds[]#)
and draft_flag = 0
(end_date < #today#) (survey_id = -1)
(survey_id in #surveyIds[]#)
and draft_flag = 0
user_id = #userId# and draft_flag = 0
sqlMap.select: select d4.cn from ( select * from tbl_deptmaster d1 where d1.cn = #deptId# and d1.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select d3.* from tbl_deptmaster d3 join tbl_addjobmaster a on d3.cn = a.deptid and a.cn = #userId# and d3.tenant_id = a.tenant_id where d3.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) d4

select d4.DEPT_CD_PATH from ( select * from tbl_deptmaster d1 where d1.cn = #deptId# and d1.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select * from tbl_deptmaster d2 where d2.cn = #companyId# and d2.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select d3.* from tbl_deptmaster d3 join tbl_addjobmaster a on d3.cn = a.deptid and a.cn = #userId# and d3.tenant_id = a.tenant_id where d3.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) d4

SELECT DISTINCT(survey_id) FROM tbl_survey_participant a join tbl_usermaster b on a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and a.company_id = b.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME and b.cn = #userId# WHERE ( (user_id = #userId# AND user_type = 'user') OR (user_id IN
#deptList[]# and (user_type = 'dept' OR user_type = 'comp') ) OR (user_id IN
#allDeptList[]#
and (user_type = 'dept' OR user_type = 'comp') AND SUBDEPTYN = 'Y' ) OR (a.user_type = 'jikchek' and (b.extensionattribute8 = a.user_id or a.user_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) OR (a.user_type = 'jikwi' and (b.extensionattribute7 = a.user_id or a.user_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) ) ) OR (user_type = 'group' and a.user_id in ( select distinct c.group_id from tbl_permissiongroupinfo c join tbl_usermaster d on d.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and d.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND c.company_id = #companyId# and d.cn = #userId# where c.group_id = a.user_id and ( (c.member_type = 'JIKCHEK' and (d.extensionattribute8 = c.member_id or c.member_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) or (c.member_type = 'JIKWI' and (d.extensionattribute7 = c.member_id or c.member_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) or (c.member_type = 'ORGAN' and d.physicaldeliveryofficename = c.member_id) or
(c.member_type = 'USER' and d.CN = c.member_id) or
(c.member_type = 'DEPT' and (d.department = c.member_id or c.member_id in (select deptid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) ) ) ) ) AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND a.company_id = #companyId#
survey_id = #surveyId#
order by update_date desc, survey_id desc limit #startPoint#, #listCount#

select s2.* from (
where survey_id in #surveyList[]# and use_status != 0 and tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# ) s2
where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select participant_id, survey_id, user_type, user_id, case when #primary# = '1' then user_name1 else user_name2 end as user_name, user_name1, user_name2, email, dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then dept_name1 else dept_name2 end as dept_name, dept_name1, dept_name2, company_id, tenant_id, SUBDEPTYN from tbl_survey_participant where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and ( (user_type = 'user' and user_id in (select cn from tbl_usermaster where tenant_id = #tenantId#)) or user_type != 'user' )
select * from tbl_survey_attachfile where target_id = #surveyId# and target_type = 'survey' and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
update tbl_survey set
title = #title#, purpose = #purpose#, user_id = #creatorId#, create_date = #createDate#, start_date = #startDate#, end_date = #endDate#, user_name1 = #creatorName1#, user_name2 = #creatorName2#, use_status = #useStatus#, open_days = #openDays#, result_public_flag = #resultPublicFlag#, anonymous_flag = #anonymousFlag#, multi_answer_flag = #multiAnswerFlag#, participate_flag = #paritipateFlag#, attach_flag = #attachFlag#, modify_flag = #modifyFlag#, draft_flag = #draftFlag#, response_flag = #responseFlag#, total_user = #totalUser#, delete_user = #deleteUser#, update_user = #updateUser#, update_date = #updateDate#, mail_flag = #mailFlag#, popup_flag = #popupFlag#
use_status = #useStatus#, open_days = #openDays#, result_public_flag = #resultPublicFlag#, anonymous_flag = #anonymousFlag#, multi_answer_flag = #multiAnswerFlag#, participate_flag = #paritipateFlag#, attach_flag = #attachFlag#, modify_flag = #modifyFlag#, draft_flag = #draftFlag#, response_flag = #responseFlag#, delete_user = #deleteUser#, update_user = #updateUser#, update_date = #updateDate#
result_public_flag = #resultPublicFlag#, anonymous_flag = #anonymousFlag#, multi_answer_flag = #multiAnswerFlag#, participate_flag = #paritipateFlag#, attach_flag = #attachFlag#, modify_flag = #modifyFlag#, draft_flag = #draftFlag#, response_flag = #responseFlag#
where survey_id = #surveyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.select: select count(response_id) from tbl_survey_response where user_id = #userId# and survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn as cn , case when #primary# = '1'then title else title2 end as position , case when #primary# = '1' then displayname else displayname2 end as displayName , displayname as displayName1 , displayname2 as displayName2 , department as department , case when #primary# = '1' then description else description2 end as departmentName , description as departmentName1 , description2 as departmentName2 , telephonenumber as telephonenumber , mail as mail , extensionattribute2 as userimage FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT U.cn as cn , case when #primary# = '1'then A.title else A.title2 end as position , case when #primary# = '1' then U.displayname else U.displayname2 end as displayName , U.displayname as displayName1 , U.displayname2 as displayName2 , A.DEPTID as department , case when #primary# = '1' then D.displayname else D.displayname2 end as departmentName , D.displayname as departmentName1 , D.displayname2 as departmentName2 , U.telephonenumber as telephonenumber , U.mail as mail , U.extensionattribute2 as userimage FROM tbl_usermaster U INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON U.CN = A.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON A.DEPTID = D.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #userId# AND A.DEPTID = #deptID# AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when '1' = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, a.displayname as dept_name1, a.displayname2 as dept_name2, a.mail as mail, a.deptlevel as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from jmocha.tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.cn = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
select * from tbl_survey_question where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by levels asc
select * from tbl_survey_option where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by question_id asc, levels asc, column_level asc, row_level asc

select * from tbl_survey_attachfile where ( ( target_id in #questionIds[]# and target_type = 'question' ) or ( target_id in #questionIds[]# and target_type = 'title' ) or ( target_id in #optionIds[]# and target_type = 'option' ) ) and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by target_type desc, target_id asc

select * from ( select r.response_id, r.survey_id, r.question_level, r.question_type, r.user_id, r.option_id, r.texts, r.row_id, r.column_id, r.ranking_level, r.slider_value, (select extensionattribute2 from TBL_USERMASTER u where d.user_id = u.cn and d.tenant_id = u.tenant_id) as image, date_add(d.response_date, interval #offset# minute) as response_date, case when #primary# = '1' then d.user_name1 else d.user_name2 end as user_name, case when #primary# = '1' then d.dept_name1 else d.dept_name2 end as dept_name, concat(#userImageFilePath#, (select extensionattribute2 from TBL_USERMASTER u where d.user_id = u.cn and d.tenant_id = u.tenant_id)) as imageFilePath from tbl_survey_response r join tbl_survey_respondent d on r.response_id = d.response_id and r.company_id = d.company_id and r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id where r.survey_id = #surveyId# and r.company_id = #companyId# and r.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) rs order by question_level asc, response_id asc
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_respondent where survey_id = #surveyId# and user_id = #userId#
delete from tbl_survey_response where survey_id = #surveyId# and user_id = #userId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey_response ( response_id, survey_id, question_level, question_type, user_id, texts, row_id, column_id, option_id, ranking_level, slider_value, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #responseId#, #surveyId#, #questionLevel#, #questionType#, #responsorId#, #texts#, #rowId#, #columnId#, #optionId#, #rankingLevel#, #sliderValue#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select: select count(distinct user_id) from tbl_survey_respondent where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
